节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: PlainArray stores key-value (KV) pairs. Each key must be unique, be of the number type, and have only one value. PlainArray is based on generics and uses a lightweight structure.
A constructor used to create a PlainArray object.
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 10200012 - The PlainArray's constructor cannot be directly invoked.

error_codes.description: The PlainArray's constructor cannot be directly invoked.

节点.功能描述: Gets the element number of the PlainArray.
Appends a key-value pair to PlainArray 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
注释信息: @param { number } key - key key Added the key of key-value
@param { T } value - value value Added the value of key-value
@throws { BusinessError } 10200011 - The add method cannot be bound.

parameters.说明: key key Added the key of key-value
value value Added the value of key-value

error_codes.description: The add method cannot be bound.

节点.功能描述: Executes a provided function once for each value in the PlainArray object. callbackFn (required) A function that accepts up to three arguments. The function to be called for each element. thisArg (Optional) The value to be used as this value for when callbackFn is called. If thisArg is omitted, undefined is used as the this value. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
